case_title: RACHEL MERTZ HART VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HART, RACHEL MERTZ AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
